title: MoHFW - Seasonal disease advisory
summary: Increased flu and dengue activity in several states. State health departments advised to strengthen surveillance.

title: ICMR - Typhoid vaccination drive
summary: Typhoid conjugate vaccine recommended in high-burden areas. Check with local health centre for availability.

title: Heat wave preparedness - early advisory
summary: States advised to prepare heat action plans. Stay hydrated, avoid outdoor exposure during peak hours.
